//: ILLUSTRATIVE example composer.json for a Sentinel Shield consuming project.
//merge: Merge the require-dev and scripts blocks into your real composer.json; do not overwrite it.
name: your-org/your-laravel-app

scripts-descriptions.sentinel:quality: Produce Sentinel Shield raw PHP reports under reports/raw/. Each step is best-effort; tools that are not installed simply do not write their report (the builder marks them unavailable).
scripts-descriptions.sentinel:tests-json: Normalize the PHPUnit JUnit report to reports/raw/tests.json.
